acceptance_criteria:
Path A acceptance (MVP):
1. Existing optimizers continue to work with legacy Predict
2. No breaking changes to optimizer API

Path B acceptance (eventual):
1. Module trait has forward_untyped method
2. Predict<S> implements Module
3. Optimizers work with typed predictor via BamlValue interchange
4. Evaluation uses BamlValue instead of Prediction
title: Phase 8: Update optimizer and Module trait for BamlValue interchange
